label: Dense Fog Advisories on Great Lakes

comments.text: Our dense fog advisory has been extended until tomorrow morning, making it almost two full days of fog here on NW Lake Michigan. #mymichigan
Kayaks in the fog on Lake Michigan near Montrose Pier
2021, Lake Michigan in dense fog, approx 2am #Milwaukee #photography
Dense fog advisory today. My favorite. Grant Park, South Milwaukee Lake front. #photography #photosofbluesky #photosky📷 #lakemichigan #milwaukee #mke #fog #densefog
It’s the fog on Lake Michigan that’s clouding everyone’s judgment.

We hit 77 here today and the open waters of Lake Michigan are in the upper 40's to low 50's still, hence the fog. Waters in the shallower bay water here are upper 50's now. We have a weird micro-climate thing going on here. And we are in two USDA Hardiness Zones lol
Another Dense Fog Advisory tonight along the Lake Michigan coast. Fog may move further inland than the advisory, so be aware of reduced visibility tonight and into tomorrow morning.
Dense fog advisory this morning. I wish I could express how much I love living on Lake Michigan. #fog #lakefog #fogadvisory #lakemichigan #photography #fogsky

I blame Lake Michigan. Every lake. Wake up early enough in these "whiplash" forecasts to dense fogs. It's cool until you realize half the biome is a swamp. If I'm gonna be near marshlands and have mystic fogs, I'd rather move to Ireland.
🚨Dense Fog Advisory in effect for Central Cook County until 6AM CST Friday. Visibility may drop to a quarter mile or less near Lake Michigan. Drive safe, folks! 🌫️🚗
We get some pretty dense fog at times on the Great Lakes. It gets dense enough at times to shut down the Mackinac Bridge.
Heads up, Windy City! 🌫️ Dense fog advisory in effect until midnight CST. Visibility down to a quarter mile near Lake Michigan. Drive safe, folks!
Mesmerizing footage shows 'fog tsunami' rolling over Lake Michigan | Latest Weather Clips | FOX Weather www.foxweather.com/watch/fmc-3h...

A bank of fog off Lake Michigan will slowly progress southeastward into late tonight, bringing visibilities in the 2-5 mile range. Locally dense (1/4 mile visibility) fog is possible, especially in low-lying areas. Turn on low beams and slow down if encountering fog! #wiwx #swiwx
That is a lot of fog on Lake Michigan.

fog. [kerri’s blog on flawed wednesday] dense fog. inland, you wouldn't know. inland it is sunny and warm. but here - on the coast of lake michigan - with very specific circumstances - we are socked in with fog. it rolled in on cloudy waves. it lingers in the trees and hangs over the street. it…

A Dense Fog Advisory is in effect until 10 AM CDT this morning for areas near Lake Michigan. Visibility of one quarter mile or less is expected. Slow down and use low beam headlights if driving in dense fog. #wiwx

A Dense Fog Advisory is in effect until 10 AM CDT Thu AM for areas near Lake Michigan. Visibility of one quarter mile or less will move inland from Lake Michigan, and may move further west overnight. Slow down and use low beam headlights if driving in dense fog. #swiwx #wiwx
Kind of obsessed with this clear sunny mild spring weather + horror movie fog combo. Is this what it's like to live in San Francisco? Should we name the Lake Michigan fog?

Dense Fog Advisory in effect until 10 AM this morning for Sheboygan to Milwaukee Counites for dense fog near Lake Michigan. Visibility of one quarter mile or less is expected at times. Other areas may see patchy dense fog form. Slow down and use low beam headlights. #swiwx #wiwx
